# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes packages, creates releases, and updates documentation. Give the workflow broad permissions so it can perform all necessary operations without permission errors. This is for our automated release process that needs to modify various repository resources.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Automated Release

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read
  issues: write
  packages: write
  pull-requests: write
  repository_projects: write
  security_events: write
  metadata: read

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Build and Publish Packages
      run: |
        # Insert commands to build and publish packages

    - name: Create Release
      run: |
        # Insert commands to create a release

    - name: Update Documentation
      run: |
        # Insert commands to update documentation
